title: MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: TILLAMOOK FAMILY COUNSELING CENTER MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A community mental health program offering a 24-hour crisis line, counseling for children and adults, family counseling, and problem gambling treatment. 906 Main Avenue Tillamook, OR 97141 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (503) 842-8201 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 842-8201 Toll-free (800) 962-2851 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and OpenCard. Sliding scale fees and payment arrangements available for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income to apply for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Tillamook County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Community Mental Health Agencies Family Counseling Individual Counseling Mental Health Evaluation Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - TILLAMOOK COUNTY CRISIS LINE REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - ADDICTION SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. TILLAMOOK FAMILY COUNSELING CENTER
